passives.name: Voidborn Resilience
passives.effects: Gain a stack for each second [[Combat status|in combat]] with enemy champions, stacking up to 5 times. At '''maximum''' stacks, increase your {{as|'''bonus''' armor}} and {{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}} by 30% until the end of combat.

effects_structured.raw: Gain a stack for each second [[Combat status in combat]] with enemy champions, stacking up to 5 times
At '''maximum''' stacks, increase your {{as '''bonus''' armor}} and {{as '''bonus''' magic resistance}} by 30% until the end of combat.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Jak'Sho, The Protean is modeled as a sustained-fight tank ramp item where resist gains depend on maintaining champion combat long enough to reach maximum stacks.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
